draft_text: Explore clinical trials about COVID-19 and mental health Find help and support What is COVID-19?
rationale: Extracted from remote_covid-19-and-mental-health_cc25eb210c28.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: COVID-19 most often affects the lungs and respiratory system, but it can also affect other parts of the body.
rationale: Extracted from remote_covid-19-and-mental-health_cc25eb210c28.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: NIMH is supporting research to understand and address the impacts of the pandemic on mental health.
rationale: Extracted from remote_covid-19-and-mental-health_cc25eb210c28.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: NIMH also supports research to help meet people’s mental health needs during the pandemic and beyond.
rationale: Extracted from remote_covid-19-and-mental-health_cc25eb210c28.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: For example, NIMH supports research investigating how pandemic-related factors, such as school disruptions, may influence children’s brain, cognitive, social, and emotional development.
rationale: Extracted from remote_covid-19-and-mental-health_cc25eb210c28.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: You can also find support and locate mental health services in your area on the Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration website.
rationale: Extracted from remote_covid-19-and-mental-health_cc25eb210c28.html and tagged for variants review.
